deck: 3 Strike, 4 Defend, Bash+, Inflame+, Headbutt, Twin Strike, Spot Weakness, Ghostly Armor, Shrug It Off, Intimidate, Flame Barrier
cause_of_death: Hexaghost Burns accumulation. By Turn 12, 5+ Burns/Burns+ in deck dealing 4 damage each at end of turn. Burns ate block, leaving nothing for Hexaghost attacks. Hexaghost at ~43/250 HP (17% remaining) when killed.
key_moments: Neow removed 2 Strikes for thin 8-card deck. Strong Str scaling: Inflame+ (+3) + Spot Weakness (+3) = up to +9 Str.

Turn 2 critical error: spent all 3E on Inflame+ + Spot Weakness + Ghostly Armor (10 block vs ~30 multi-hit incoming = 20 unblocked damage, 55->35 HP). The 20 HP lost here was the margin that made Burns lethal by Turn 12.
No AOE -- 5 small slimes fight drained 15 HP unnecessarily.
Intimidate forced on Turn 11 at 7 HP for survival instead of saved for Inferno.
Flame Barrier played Turn 12, too late to save.
lessons: Hexaghost Turn 2 blocking is mandatory -- even with strong Str scaling, 20 unblocked damage on Turn 2 makes Burns lethal later. Budget at least 1E for block on Turn 2.
Burns+ (upgraded Burns) deal 4 damage each, not 2 -- significantly worse than regular Burns.
This is the 4th Hexaghost death despite extensive playbook guidance -- Turn 2 setup greed is a new specific failure mode not previously documented.
Deck had strong damage scaling but missing AOE and healing criteria.
